Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Male - Message ID
Fields.Description: PC Gender is Male: Specify Message-> Menu

Fields.Name: Male - Voice ID
Fields.Description: PC Gender is Male: Specify Voice-> Sound

Fields.Name: Return Position
Fields.Description: Relative position of returning conversation-> Conversation

Fields.Name: Female - Message ID
Fields.Description: PC Gender is Female: Specify Message-> Menu

Fields.Name: Female - Voice ID
Fields.Description: PC Gender is Female: Specify Voice-> Sound

Fields.Name: Lip Sync Start
Fields.Description: Speaker: Lip-sync start time. -1 with no lip-sync

Fields.Name: Lip Sync Time
Fields.Description: Speaker: Lip-sync duration. Lip-sync at -1 continues forever

Fields.Name: Voice Playback Timeout
Fields.Description: Voice playback timeout period. In case of -1, time-out processing is performed in NPC conversation voice playback timeout time of Common_Game system parameter.

Fields.Name: Force Subtitle Display
Fields.Description: Do you want to force the display of subtitles? Display subtitles even when subtitles are turned off as an option
